category_sources: source_facts.description says tools for working with VCF files; official VCFtools site describes tools for complex genetic variation data in VCF files.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is vcftools; official homepage and manual use VCFtools.
docs_sources: Official VCFtools GitHub Pages site provides documentation and an extended manual page for options.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/vcftools/vcftools, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables list VCF utilities; official homepage says VCFtools is written in Perl and C++ and supports filtering, comparing, summarizing, converting, validating, merging, intersections, and subsets.
